title: Time Travel and backups
excerpt: description: Restore a D1 database to any minute within the last 30 days using Time Travel point-in-time recovery. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Time Travel is D1's approach to backups and point-in-time-recovery, and allows you to restore a database to any minute within the last 30 days. * You do not need to enable Time Travel. It is always on.
